feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC - dynamic text needed for folder path
entry.content:
Hi

I would like to use a dynamic txt in SAC stories showing the folder just below 'Public' for the story. 

This indicates to the readers if the story is an official corporate story or not. We need an indicator that changes automatically when a copy is made but placed in another local location.

Does anyone have a trick for this which does not include using a template?

thanks

entry.title: SAC customized usage statistics based on the dimensions defined individually
entry.content:
Hi All,

SAC is missing customized objects and usage statistics based on the dimensions defined individually by each SAP customer. There is no option to see the % of dashboards in Finance, Sales etc, as well as differentiate on what part of those is IT developed and what by the Business.

There is no additional story/model/insight attribute except of the catalog filters. Those would be working perfect here - as already enable defining own dimensions. Unfortunately they are only used for filtering in catalog and are not included in the system overview so we can't do any statistics.

Anyone figured out on how to resolve that? I have just opened the Influence request, so please vote as well if you'd find that solution fitting for you as well: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/340627/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: SAC Data Leakage Prevention
entry.content:
Hello SAC Technology Community

In different scenarios, I've been facing the question of how can we prevent data leakage on SAC. How can this be monitored elegantly? And are there options to get alerted by unusual activities?

It would be great if you have any ideas.

entry.title: How to Calculate/Filter Aggregation of Measures for different hierarchy subtotals in SAC/HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

It is a long post but I want to give all details to explain clearly what we try to achieve.

We are preparing a sales report that contains a three-level category hierarchy.

  • Data Source: HANA Cloud Calculation View
  • Connection Type: Live Connection
  • Hierarchy Type: Level-Based Hierarchy
  • Story Type: Optimized Story
  • Component Type to Represent Data in the Story: Table, KPI Tile (Numeric Point)

Context

To briefly explain the context, consider the sales of a retail store where multiple products from different categories are sold within a single transaction (check). Our objective is to analyze:

  • The sales quantity and amount of these products, and
  • The number of checks in which these products appear, along with the total sales amount of those checks.

We have four main measures:

  1. Number of Items Sold: Represents the number of products sold. 
  2. Number of Checks: Shows the number of distinct checks (transactions) in which a specific product has been sold.
  3. Sales Amount of the Item: Displays the total sales amount of a product across different checks.
  4. Total Sales Amount of Checks: Displays the total amount of the checks that include that specific product. – WE HAVE A PROBLEM WITH THIS MEASURE
    • (According to the example in the screenshot, product P001 has been sold in checks 1001, 1002, and 1003. This measure sums the total sales amounts of these three checks, including all other products sold in those transactions. You can analyze this further in the attached screenshot )

The Challenge/Problem

The total sales amount of items sold and the total sales amount of the checks containing these products must match at the total row.

Since same check may contain different products, the challenge arises when displaying the data in a table:

  • The Total Sales Amount of Checks column gets summed across multiple occurrences, causing double counting. If different products are in the same check, since the table contains product level data, this measure shows total sales amount of that check in 2 different row and sums these values at total node.

What possible solutions can be implemented in HANA Cloud Calculation View or SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to handle this requirement correctly?

Looking forward to your support. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help.

I have configured IAS as a proxy, and in IAS, I have set the Subject Name Identifier=employee_id

In Azure (OpenID Connection to IAS), I have added the employee_id to Additional Claims.

In the source system (Azure) in IPS, I have configured the transformation as follows:

{
"sourcePath": "$.employeeId",
"targetPath": "$.userName",
"correlationAttribute": true
}

Also in IPS transformation I replaced "sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName" with "sourcePath": "$.employeeId".

Users are provisioned with IPS.

In IAS, the "Login Name" field for users receives the employee_id, for example, 1111. These users are then provisioned to SAC and have the employee_id (1111) in the "USER ID" field as well.

When I try to test SSO and select "Choose a user attribute to map to your Identity Provider" -> User attribute set = "USER ID", the user is not found in SAC.

The user accesses the SAC link and enters their email address. The user is authenticated in Azure, but in SAC, the user is not found.

I need help.

I can't solve this by myself.

Thank you very much !!!

entry.title: Dynamic Text in Column Headers of Table Section in SAC
entry.content:
Dear All 

this is my problem please suggest how can I manually add year irrespective of measure dimensions coming from a model You are working on a live data model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), fetching data from SAP BW. In your data, you have a dimension called "Category," which includes members like "Outlook," "Business Plan 2025," "Business Plan 2026," "Business Plan 2027," "Business Plan 2028," and "Business Plan 2029." You have created five additional calculated columns derived from these original columns and hidden the original columns. Now, you want to ensure that the column headers dynamically update when the year changes (e.g., from 2025 to 2026). Specifically, you want the column headers to automatically adjust to "Business Plan 2026," "Business Plan 2027," "Business Plan 2028," "Business Plan 2029," and "Business Plan 2030" without manual intervention.

entry.title: Analytical Query C_PhysInvtryQuery not accessible thru SAC
entry.content:
Hey Folks

There is an  SAP standard analytical query in S/4 called C_PhysInvtryQuery.  When I look it up in Query Browser app, it shows up but when I go to SAC Data Analyzer this query does not show up.  This query is exposed (Analytic.Query:true) (see image).  Please help me figure out why I cannot see it in SAC.

entry.title: Create Counter for same properties in dimension
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am currently working on a problem in SAC where I am looking to optimize my solution.

I have a customer with a very specific expectation. For simplification reasons let us assume the SAC model has one dimension called "User" with 2 properties "CostCenter" and "WFH Flag". The model has one measure called "Counter" which is currently blank. Now the customer wants to fill this measure, so that for each user you are able to see the count of the CostCenter and WFH Flag.

Before:

UserCost CenterWFH FlagCounter
A1Remote-
B1Remote-
C1Hybrid-
D2Office-
E2Office-
F2Office-
G3Remote-

 

After:

UserCost CenterWFH FlagCounter
A1Remote2
B1Remote2
C1Hybrid1
D2Office3
E2Office3
F2Office3
G3Remote

1

I have created this solution by looping through the user dimension, counting the concatenated string of CostCenter and Flag. Then I place it into a property of the user dimension which I write to a measure via data action.

This approach is fine if you have a few users. But with thousands of users it will take some time.

Is there a better approach for example using data action functionalities? I was thinking of having a loop in the DTAs but I did not manage to get it.

Thank you!

entry.title: Row Level Security in SAC
entry.content:
Can we share a story in a view mode with a BI content viewer user role without sharing the model files with this user?

Or is there any customization to the content viewer role to help achieve this?

Also, I don't want to make the user BI Admin, I only want to give them read privileges.

Thank you

entry.title: Is it possible to read and filter the dimension hierarchy from live connection to SAC Planning model
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

On SAP Datasphere, there is a dimension hierarchy defined and I want to use the same hierarchy to filter out the members on my SAC planning model. For Example, Industry is a dimension and under it there are multiple leaf members like Automobile, Food, Retail, Pharma. I have not maintained the same hierarchy in SAC Planning model but rather have maintained only the leaf members.

The requirement is if the user selects the "Industry" hierarchy in the story, the table should filter only those members which are part of Industry hierarchy by reading it from SAP Datasphere analytical view. Is it possible to enable this functionality using scripting in SAC or is it mandatory to maintain the hierarchy in SAC Planning model for this requirement?

Anyone who has faced this issue recently or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Is there any way to sync an all-Page filter with an Input_Control filter?
entry.content:
I have a bar chart in Page 1. I want to select a dimension in the bar chart from Page 1 to filter whole of Page 2 using that value.

I'm able to do this, but the problem is that I already have an Input Control page filter on Page 2; the value of which is not changing because of the Page 1 filter. Is there any way to sync the All-Page / Story filter with an Input Control filter?

entry.title: How to Consume string variable created in r visualiation into SAC script ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using r visualization, and I want to consume string variable created in R script, and now I want to use it in SAC script, but unfartunately I am not able to do it. Not sure what mistake I am doing.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++
in R script

++++++++++++++++++++++++++

++++++++++++++++++++++++++
in SAC script

++++++++++++++++++++++++++

++++++++++++++++++++++++++
Result

++++++++++++++++++++++++++

For string I am getting undefined.

entry.title: Null value in Date Picker Custom Widget in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello - Is it possible to show null value in Date Picker as default if nothing is maintained for the selected record?

This is how it should show when I am creating a new record. It works fine when I do this as a first step.

But when I choose to update an existing record, it shows "End Date" from that record, which is perfectly fine. But, when I click on creating a new record, it shows the "End Date" from previous record. I tried to clear the variable which is used to set the date. But, it doesn't help. Any input here will be really helpful.

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Can anyone assist me with currency conversion? I’ve tried every possible solution, but nothing seems to work.

I've created a model with the following measures and dimensions:

  • Measures: Amount
  • Dimensions: Version, Account, Product, Organization, Date

Additionally, I have a currency table labeled SAC_CURRENCY. The model

currently has a single version (Actual), and the Account dimension in focus is Cost of Goods Sold (COGS).

After summing up all child GL accounts and performing the currency conversion to USD, the expected value for COGS should be 3,104,631,397. However, the model is showing an incorrect value of 4,096.74 million, which is significantly off.

Can someone help identify what might be causing this issue? why is this happening please refer screenshots which will be helful in identifying what's causing this why it's appearing incorrect even when taking default value as fixed that is usd or taken from dimension 

 

the import file data 

 

Version 

Account 

date is 2018 till 2019

Product 

Organization 

Model preferences 

currency table 

after doing all settings nor cross caluculation tab is appearing

entry.title: How to add days to an existing date via advanced formulae
entry.content:
Hi - I need to add 84 days to an existing date in a model.

I am using 

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Quantity"
MEMBERSET [d/Last_Modified_Date] = "2025-02-11"

DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/GestationDate]=NEXT(84,"DAY",[d/Close_Date]))

However running this has no effect.

I only want to update any GestationDate where the Last_Modified_Date = '2025-02-11' (or preferably use the TODAY() function somehow ) with whatever is in the Close_Date + 84 days.

I have seen a couple of threads on this and from those I tried this but it has no effect when I run the data action.

Am I trying to perform the impossible?

The whole reason I am doing this is because I am using an API to push data into this model and there is no wrangling facility available or it would be a simple case of creating a calculated column of [GestationDate]=DATEADD([d/Close_Date],84,"day") and loading it in.

Also - I cannot add this calculated field to the source.

I was thinking if I can get this script to run on the hour a couple of minutes after the api runs it would do the trick.

Any help much appreciated.

entry.title: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
I want to show the story filter value in a textbox. If 'All' is selected in the filter, then it should show 'All Business Units' otherwise it should show only the specific value that is selected. 

Currently what I did: I used a dynamic text & added that in the textbox. It shows 'All Business Units' when 'All' is selected in the filter, but if other options are selected (for example X or Y), then it is showing 'X Business Units' or 'Y Business Units' because the Business Units section is hardcoded in the textbox. I only want to show X or Y when the specific option is selected in the filter.

Is this possible to achieve? Kindly suggest if there's any way to achieve this!

entry.title: Passing variable/parameter/prompt values through URL
entry.content:
I am facing difficulty in passing the Variable/parameters/prompt values dynamically(that show up once you open a story) from Story1 to Story2. Story1 has 3 mandatory date Variable/parameters/prompts and 2 non mandatory Variable/parameters/prompts. Also Story2 has 3 mandatory date Variable/parameters/prompts and 2 non mandatory Variable/parameters/prompts.

I have a table widget in Story1 and i am adding hyperlink to the table using 'External URL' option. After applying this option a hyperlink will be shown below the table title something like "Navigate to External URL' (see attached image). Now when the user clicks on that hyperlink Story2 should open with the Variable/parameters/prompt values applied to the story1.

I created URL like 

https://<TENANT>/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/<TENANT_ID>/app.html#/story2&/s2/<STORY_ID>?v01Model=<Model_ID>&v01Par=<technical name of parameter1 in story2>&v01Val=<technical name of parameter1 in story1>&v02Par=<technical name of parameter2 in story2>&v02Val=<technical name of parameter2 in story1> ... &v05Par=<technical name of parameter5 in story2>&v05Val=<technical name of parameter5 in story1>

But this is not working. I mean story2 variable/parameter/prompt values are not updated with the variable/parameter/prompt values of the story1.

Models used in both story’s are Datasphere models

How to achieve this. Pls suggest.

entry.title: Blending Live data with import data option in Model or Story Level
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I am facing issues in blending Live data to Import data, We have already built a dashboard with import data, so linking up live data is the requirement. But we are facing difficulties on it,

In model level also not able to connect 

In story level also I am able to link dimensions only in Charts, Table Link dimension option is not available in Optimized designing.

Request your insight on this possibility.

entry.title: How to change a numeric value to a percentage value in a numeric point chart in SAC?
entry.content:
I have a numeric point chart which shows some value & this value is coming from a filter / input_control in SAC.

I want to use a button to switch between a numeric value & a percentage value in the chart. Is this possible to achieve? Kindly share solutions, if possible!

entry.title: Bug Report – Dynamic Text Boxes Not Updating on Subpages When Navigating Directly
entry.content:
We have a story with 28 pages in total—4 main pages and 24 subpages. Our design uses four date/year input controls located on the main pages to update dynamic text boxes across all pages. Each main-page input control is responsible for updating dynamic text boxes on approximately 6–7 subpages.

Issue:
When users bypass the main pages and jump directly to subpages, the dynamic text boxes fail to update. It appears that the necessary data and input control configurations are not loaded because the user did not visit the main page where the controls reside. As a result, the date data is not reflected on the subpages.

Impact:

  • User Experience: End users see outdated or missing date information on subpages.
  • Performance: Adding duplicate input controls to each subpage is not a viable solution as it degrades overall performance.

Request:
Could you please advise on a solution or workaround that ensures dynamic text boxes on subpages load correctly even when users navigate directly to them? We are looking for an approach that does not require placing input controls on every page.

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this issue.

#SAC #SAP Analytics Cloud
